text.title: Meta Ads Reporting and Diagnosis Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real ads-meta-reporting engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Report leads with CPA up 30%; no breakdown; no causal analysis.
antipattern.fix: Always include breakdown by age / placement / device + symptom→cause column.

antipattern.symptom: Frequency 4.2; CTR halved; report says 'creative needs work'.
antipattern.fix: Mandatory Frequency column; trigger rotation lever at 2.5+.

antipattern.symptom: Report ships 12 recommendations; 1 executed in 4 weeks.
antipattern.fix: Each action gets named owner + expected CPA/ROAS delta; cap top-5 only.
